productDisplayName: U.S. Polo Assn. Denim Co. Men Striped Navy Blue T-Shirt
description: Style NoteProject your love for the game with this stylish T-shirt from US Polo. The classic styling on this tee makes it perfect for casual and semi-formal occasions. Pair this with straight Fit denims and canvas shoes.Product DetailsNavy blue and red striped polo T-shirt, has a spread collar, a buttoned placket, embroidery on the left chest, short sleeves with ribbed cuffs and a vented hemMaterial and Care100% cottonWash dark colours separatelyMachine wash or hand wash cold using a mild detergentDo not wring, bleach, or iron on printFlat dry in shadeSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size M
